falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4200 on any day in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 low held above 4200; a break below would confirm this is not that pattern and likely a deeper correction/bear phase

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 suggests controlled fear; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic selling not consistent with a bottoming pattern, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal as it would demand defensive repositioning

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50bps and holds for 3+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion with persistence would signal escalating recession risk, breaking the macro bottom narrative that the current pattern implies; the August 2024 bottom saw curve steepening, not flattening/inverting

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
